summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Little Eat Italy pizzeria website with CMS system. All core functionality working perfectly including Maradona graffiti background, German content, and 4 action buttons as required.
passed_tests: GET /api/content returns site content with hero buttons (4 action buttons: UBER EATS, LIEFERANDO, BESTELLEN ZUM ABHOLEN, TISCHRESERVIERUNG)
PUT /api/content/hero updates hero content including buttons successfully
Homepage loads with Maradona graffiti background image correctly
All 4 action buttons are visible and clickable with proper data-testid attributes
Navigation links work in German (START, SPEISEKARTE, ÜBER UNS, KONTAKT)
Menu page loads with German category tabs
Contact form works with German labels and success message
All text content is properly displayed in German
Backend API /api/menu returns menu items (100% success rate)
Backend API /api/menu/featured returns featured items correctly
Contact form submission displays success message in German
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all core functionality working)
